scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev -w @trao/web" "npm run dev -w @trao/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @trao/web && npm run build -w @trao/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @trao/web && npm run lint -w @trao/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @trao/web && npm run typecheck -w @trao/api
